---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that isn't working correctly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- **Browser:** (e.g. Chrome 120, Safari 17, Firefox 121)
- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 14, iOS 17, Android 14, Windows 11)
- **Running as:** PWA (installed) / Browser tab
- **Sync enabled:** Yes / No

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (console errors, recent changes, etc.).
